apps.name: Aware
apps.subtitle: Be aware with yourself
apps.localizedDescription: Track your daily habits with streaks, log how you feel and why, capture the small moments of your day, and see it all on a calendar. Everything stays on your device.

versions.localizedDescription: Home-screen widgets (habit streaks + quick capture), daily habit reminders, mood history chart, Face ID app lock, and a new Settings screen.

privacy.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Record voice notes for journal entries.
privacy.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Lock the app so only you can open it.
